scripts.deploy: pnpm turbo run build --filter @prisma/example-cron... && ( set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-compose deploy module.ts ${CRON_STACK_NAME:+--name "$CRON_STACK_NAME"} )
scripts.destroy: ( set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-compose destroy module.ts ${CRON_STACK_NAME:+--name "$CRON_STACK_NAME"} )
